barInfo.name: Last Hope Bar & Cafe
barInfo.address: 111 Châu Thị Vĩnh Tế, Ngũ Hành Sơn, Đà Nẵng 550000

drinks.name: Last Rites
drinks.desc: Aged rum · tamarind syrup · Angostura bitters · smoked salt rim

drinks.name: Saigon Drift
drinks.desc: Lychee vodka · fresh lemongrass · kaffir lime · soda

drinks.name: Midnight Garden
drinks.desc: Gin · butterfly pea flower · tonic · mint · cucumber

drinks.name: Red Dragon
drinks.desc: Mezcal · dragon fruit · chili tincture · lime · agave

drinks.name: Negroni
drinks.desc: Campari · gin · sweet vermouth · orange peel

drinks.name: Café Đen
drinks.desc: Vietnamese drip coffee · black · no drama

events.name: Open Mic Night
events.desc: Bring your guitar, your voice or just your ears. Anyone welcome on stage.

events.name: DJ No Genre
events.desc: Resident DJ spins from soul to techno. No dress code. No rules.

events.name: Live Band
events.desc: Rotating local and visiting bands. Check Instagram for this week's lineup.

events.name: Slow Sunday
events.desc: Acoustic sessions, 2-for-1 cocktails before 8 PM. Come in pyjamas.

reviews.text: "The kind of bar that makes you forget you have a flight in the morning."
"Stumbled in, stayed four hours. The black cat judged me the whole time. 10/10."
"Best cocktails in Quy Nhơn, best playlist, best vibe. Nothing else to say."
"A true hidden gem. Art all over the walls, neon lights and a disco ball. Came back three nights in a row."

promo.body:
Show up, say the code to the bartender.
First drink is on us.
